header.badge: Ngaahi Founga Fakatekinolosia ʻo e Pisinisi
header.description: Mei he fakalakalaka ʻo e polokalama fakakomipiuta mo e ʻilo fakapisinisi ʻoku fakalele ʻe he AI ki he faʻunga ʻao mo e ngaahi founga IoT — ʻoku mau ʻoatu ʻa e ngaahi ngaue fakatekinolosia fakalukufua ʻoku ne fakaʻaiʻai ʻa e ngaahi meʻa foʻou mo fakavaveʻi ʻa e tupulaki.
header.exploreSolutions: Vakaiʻi ʻa e ngaahi founga ke fakaleleiʻi
header.trustedBy: Falala ki he ngaahi pisinisi ʻoku fakakaukau ki muʻa
